overview: AIPS is an AI-powered interview preparation platform that helps students and professionals land their dream jobs. It provides tools for building ATS-optimized resumes, practicing with role-specific interview questions, simulating mock interviews with AI feedback, exploring curated study topics, identifying skill gaps, and tracking your readiness score over time.
features: Internet Identity authentication with role and target job onboarding
AI Resume Builder with improvement suggestions and PDF export
Role-specific Interview Q&A with expand/collapse answers and scoring rubrics
Text-based Mock Interview simulation with AI evaluation and feedback
Curated Study Topics by role with progress tracking
Skill Gap Analysis with prioritized study plan
Analytics Dashboard with readiness score trends and performance charts
